samples.xml_description:
<module id="width_8to16">
    <description>Converts 8-bit data input to 16-bit data output.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="valid_in">Input signal indicating the validity of the input data.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input data.</input>
        <output id="valid_out">Output signal indicating the validity of the output data.</output>
        <output id="data_out" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output data.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="state" width_description="[1:0]">
            <enum-value id="state_0" value="2'b00">State 0 description.</enum-value>
            <enum-value id="state_1" value="2'b01">State 1 description.</enum-value>
            <enum-value id="state_2" value="2'b10">State 2 description.</enum-value>
        </enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic id="data_out" type="sequential_logic">
            <description>Update data_out register on the positive edge of the clock or negative edge of reset.</description>
            <condition>
                <description>Reset condition</description>
                <not>
                    <id>rst_n</id>
                </not>
            </condition>
            <assignment>
                <description>Set data_out to 0 when reset</description>
                <constant value="16'b0"/>
            </assignment>
            <altcondition>
                <description>Valid data input and flag is 1, concatenate data_lock and data_in to form data_out</description>
                <and>
                    <id>valid_in</id>
                    <id>flag</id>
                </and>
            </altcondition>
            <altassignment>
                <description>Concatenate data_lock and data_in to data_out</description>
                <concat>
                    <id>data_lock</id>
                    <id>data_in</id>
                </concat>
            </altassignment>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="data_lock" type="sequential_logic">
            <description>Update data_lock register on the positive edge of the clock or negative edge of reset.</description>
            <condition>
                <description>Reset condition</description>
                <not>
                    <id>rst_n</id>
                </not>
            </condition>
            <assignment>
                <description>Set data_lock to 0 when reset</description>
                <constant value="8'b0"/>
            </assignment>
            <altcondition>
                <description>Valid data input and flag is 0, update data_lock with data_in</description>
                <and>
                    <id>valid_in</id>
                    <not>
                        <id>flag</id>
                    </not>
                </and>
            </altcondition>
            <altassignment>
                <description>Update data_lock with data_in</description>
                <id>data_in</id>
            </altassignment>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="flag" type="sequential_logic">
            <description>Update flag register on the positive edge of the clock or negative edge of reset.</description>
            <condition>
                <description>Reset condition</description>
                <not>
                    <id>rst_n</id>
                </not>
            </condition>
            <assignment>
                <description>Set flag to 0 when reset</description>
                <constant value="1'b0"/>
            </assignment>
            <altcondition>
                <description>Valid data input, update flag to 1</description>
                <and>
                    <id>valid_in</id>
                    <not>
                        <id>flag</id>
                    </not>
                </and>
            </altcondition>
            <altassignment>
                <description>Update flag with constant 1</description>
                <constant value="1'b1"/>
            </altassignment>
        </sequential_logic>
    </logic_description>
    <task>
        <description>Initialize state, data_out, data_lock, and flag.</description>
        <state>state_0</state>
        <data_out>16'b0</data_out>
        <data_lock>8'b0</data_lock>
        <flag>1'b0</flag>
    </task>
</module>
